vocabulary.example_sentence: This policy will bring about significant changes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这项政策将带来重大变化。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The rough terrain made the journey difficult.

vocabulary.example_sentence: The ground was covered with snow.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 地面被雪覆盖了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A powerful sandstorm swept across the desert.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 一场强沙尘暴席卷了沙漠。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Large areas of farmland are being developed.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 大片农田正在被开发。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There is a shortage of fresh water in the region.

vocabulary.example_sentence: Rich soil is essential for growing crops.

vocabulary.example_sentence: The sandy beach was perfect for a vacation.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这片沙滩非常适合度假。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The government implemented new environmental policies.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 政府实施了新的环境政策。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We support sustainable development.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们支持可持续发展。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Corn is one of the most important crops worldwide.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 玉米是世界上最重要的作物之一。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The company uses high-tech equipment in manufacturing.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 该公司在制造过程中使用高科技设备。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Vegetables grow in the greenhouse year-round.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 温室里一年四季都种着蔬菜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The highway connects the two major cities.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这条公路连接着两座大城市。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The railway network expanded to rural areas.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 铁路网扩展到了农村地区。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The national park is a major tourist attraction.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 国家公园是一个主要的旅游景点。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our company produces high-quality products.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们公司生产高质量的产品。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The new technology has greatly improved productivity.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新技术极大地提高了生产力。

vocabulary.chinese: 社会主义者；社会主义的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Socialist policies aim to reduce inequality.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 社会主义政策旨在减少不平等。

vocabulary.example_sentence: E-payment services have become increasingly popular.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电子支付服务越来越受欢迎。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Affordable housing is a major concern for the government.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 可负担的住房是政府关注的主要问题。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Digital technology has transformed education.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 数字技术改变了教育。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The audio quality of the recording is excellent.

vocabulary.example_sentence: Heavy rain turned the dirt road into mud.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 大雨把土路变成了泥路。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The railway track runs through the savanna.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 铁路轨道穿过稀树草原。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The new highway is wide enough for two lorries.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新公路宽得可以容纳两辆卡车。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The railway links the port to the capital.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 铁路将港口与首都连接起来。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Goods from abroad arrive at the port every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 来自国外的货物每天抵达港口。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Nairobi is the capital of Kenya.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 内罗毕是肯尼亚的首都。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many Kenyan workers helped build the railway.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多肯尼亚工人参与了铁路的建设。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The new railway will benefit local villagers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新铁路将使当地村民受益。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The manager is happy with the team's progress.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 经理对团队的进展感到满意。

vocabulary.example_sentence: E-payment makes shopping more convenient.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电子支付使购物更加便利。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The port supports many small businesses.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 港口扶持着许多小型企业。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Digital tools brought ease to daily work.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 数字工具给日常工作带来了便利。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She completed the difficult task with ease.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她轻而易举地完成了这项艰巨的任务。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A lorry carried corn from the farmland to the city.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 一辆卡车把玉米从农田运到城市。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The station manager checked the timetable.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 站长查看了时刻表。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In conclusion, the project greatly improved transport.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 总之，该项目极大地改善了交通。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The narrow track was hard for wide lorries to pass.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 狭窄的小径很难让宽大的卡车通过。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Villagers welcomed the new railway station.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 村民们欢迎新的火车站。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Kenyan runners have won many medals at the Olympics.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 肯尼亚选手在奥运会上赢得了许多奖牌。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The lake is a man-made reservoir for the city.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个湖是供城市使用的人工水库。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many people called the recovery a miracle.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多人把这次康复称为奇迹。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Kenya took the lead in building the new railway.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 肯尼亚在修建新铁路方面处于领先地位。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She teaches in a junior school near the railway station.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她在火车站附近的一所初中任教。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many workers rent a flat close to the port.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多工人在港口附近租公寓。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The class had a lively discussion about Kenya's development.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 全班就肯尼亚的发展进行了热烈的讨论。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Transport is a key aspect of the country's growth.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 交通是该国发展的一个关键方面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The railway connects Nairobi to the port city of Mombasa.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 铁路将内罗毕与港口城市蒙巴萨连接起来。
